text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Biko and Bono invited me to hang out
again. If you're free, why don't you come with us?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since her last trip ended on a sour note, I accept
her invite to keep an eye on the situation.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Mm! The weather is so nice... It makes me want to
take a nap on the grass.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, don't do that! We have to take a better
picture with Carrot Ranger today to make up for
last time, so let's go!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I remember you three from the amusement
park. Sorry about the way things turned out last
time! How's the angle of my punch?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Carrot Ranger, could you... No, never mind! Don't
worry about it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Just go ahead and give your best Carrot Ranger
Punch with my friend, please!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text: All right. Here I go! Carrot Ranger Puuuunch!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So I heard that at this farm, you can actually
make your own giant cake!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Really?! Wow! That sounds so fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Chef
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry. The giant cake workshop is
reservation only...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
choice_data_list: I-it's okay, Chiyono O. Don't let it get you—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Then shall we have a go at the regular cake
workshop instead?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm certain it will be a lot of fun with all of us
working on it together! Don't you think,
Akebono?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Let's do that! Having fun making tasty food
is the most buono thing ever! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Whew! That was fun! Why don't we take a break
here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back when she was only focused on being
dependable, she might've gotten upset about
what happened, but it seems she's fully enjoying
the day.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's wrong, Trainer? You're spacing out
hard.
choice_data_list: I'm just worried you might be overdoing it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Overdoing it? Oh. Right.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... The old me would have been trying to do
everything I could to seem dependable.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But then I realized something, on that day when I
hung out with Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Patients don't find doctors trustworthy simply
based on what they say.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What patients want is a doctor that will take them
seriously and who genuinely cares for their
well-being.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The same thing goes for the teacher we saw in the
park, and the teacher who taught me to make
sakura mochi. We don't respect them because
they know everything in the world.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
We look up to them because they put their
students first... And...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You're the same too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've never expected life-changing advice or
awe-inspiring quotes from you. Heck, I never
even thought about what kind of
accomplishments you've garnered.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But when I'm stressed, you help me out, and when
I'm on the verge of overdoing things, you stop
me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Those are the actions that make me want to chase
my dreams together with you... Because I can tell
you care.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've realized that it's not a person's words or even
their actions that really matter—it's their
intentions!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And I think I can honestly say... my intentions
have been good all along. Even at the amusement
park, I was just being considera—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O! Wanna play sumo tug-of-war with a
bull?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sumo?! Count me in! I'll be the referee!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna head over! It's time to continue my fun
day with everyone!
choice_data_list: I depend on you as much as you depend on me.
I depend on you as much as you depend on me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna head over! It's time to continue my fun
day with everyone!
choice_data_list: I depend on you as much as you depend on me.
I depend on you as much as you depend on me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Of course! You have no idea how many
times I played referee with my dad!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This is what you might call "a fit more perfect
than an Umamusume's signature racewear!"
choice_data_list:
Um... So you mean you're the only one for the
job?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yes! Exactly! Okay, I'm going now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she leaves, I can't help but reflect on how
much she's grown... Even her proverbs make a
little sense now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, gosh... Having someone I depend on say that
to me makes my tail feel all floofy and twitchy...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: W-well, anyway! I'll see you later! Bye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she quickly runs off, I can't help but think she's
grown a lot lately.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What?! You too?! I'm not sure you'll be able to
handle it...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's not what you do, it's how you think, huh?
Okay, sure! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that... I lose by a landslide to the bull, but I
find it a very intense and fulfilling challenge!
